title: Better Bed Items
description: Better Bed Items replaces the inventory models of beds with 2D sprites just like Minecraft had before the World of Color Update. These textures aren't just ripped from older versions and recolored, rather they've been reworked from the ground up!
body: Better Bed Items replaces the inventory models of beds with 2D sprites just like Minecraft had before the World of Color Update. These textures aren't just ripped from older versions are recolored (looking at you Bedrock). These bad boys have been reworked from the ground up to fit in with modern Minecraft textures!
